name: storage.googleapis.com/api/request_count
definition: Number of API calls per bucket. Primary traffic signal for all GCS operations. Labeled by method and response_code.
absence_means: Bucket has no API traffic in the window
cardinality_footguns: Safe — method (~20) and response_code (~15) are bounded

name: storage.googleapis.com/network/sent_bytes_count
definition: Bytes sent (egress) over the network per bucket. Primary bandwidth and cost signal. Labeled by method and response_code.
absence_means: No egress traffic from this bucket

name: storage.googleapis.com/network/received_bytes_count
definition: Bytes received (ingress) over the network per bucket. Measures upload/write bandwidth.
absence_means: No ingress traffic to this bucket

name: storage.googleapis.com/storage/total_bytes
definition: Total size of all objects in the bucket grouped by storage class. Updated once per 24 hours. Primary capacity metric.
absence_means: Bucket is empty or metric not yet populated (first 24h)

name: storage.googleapis.com/storage/object_count
definition: Number of objects per bucket by storage class. Updated once per 24 hours.
absence_means: Bucket is empty

name: storage.googleapis.com/storage/total_byte_seconds
definition: Daily storage consumed in byte-seconds. Used for billing calculations. Reported as gauge in Tsuga (GCP type: cumulative).
absence_means: Bucket is empty

name: storage.googleapis.com/api/request_count
definition: Same metric as traffic but filtered for error response codes. Server errors: INTERNAL|UNAVAILABLE|DEADLINE_EXCEEDED. Client errors: PERMISSION_DENIED|NOT_FOUND|INVALID_ARGUMENT. Throttling: RESOURCE_EXHAUSTED.
absence_means: No errors — healthy

name: storage.googleapis.com/replication/meeting_rpo
definition: Whether the bucket is meeting its Recovery Point Objective. 1 = meeting 0 = not meeting. Only exists for dual/multi-region buckets with turbo replication. NOT FOUND in Tsuga — feature not enabled in this account.
absence_means: Feature not enabled or bucket is single-region — NOT an outage

name: storage.googleapis.com/replication/turbo_max_delay
definition: Maximum age in seconds of an unsynced object. NOT FOUND in Tsuga — turbo replication not enabled in this account.
absence_means: Turbo replication not enabled — NOT a problem

name: storage.googleapis.com/replication/missing_rpo_minutes_last_30d
definition: Number of minutes in last 30 days where RPO was missed. NOT FOUND in Tsuga — turbo replication not enabled.
absence_means: Turbo replication not enabled

name: storage.googleapis.com/authn/authentication_count
definition: Number of authenticated API requests. NOT FOUND in Tsuga — metric not collected in this account.
absence_means: Not collected by this GCP integration

name: storage.googleapis.com/authz/acl_operations_count
definition: Number of ACL operations. NOT FOUND in Tsuga — metric not collected or uniform access enabled.
absence_means: Not collected or uniform bucket-level access enabled (desired state)

name: storage.googleapis.com/authz/acl_based_object_access_count
definition: Number of object accesses via ACL. NOT FOUND in Tsuga — not collected or uniform access enabled.
absence_means: Not collected or uniform bucket-level access enabled (desired state)

name: storage.googleapis.com/autoclass/transition_operation_count
definition: Number of storage class transitions by Autoclass. NOT FOUND in Tsuga — Autoclass not enabled.
absence_means: Autoclass not enabled on this bucket — NOT an error

name: storage.googleapis.com/autoclass/transitioned_bytes_count
definition: Total bytes transitioned by Autoclass. NOT FOUND in Tsuga — Autoclass not enabled.
absence_means: Autoclass not enabled or no transitions needed

name: storage.googleapis.com/storage/v2/total_bytes
definition: Total size of all objects and multipart uploads. V2 adds type label to distinguish live vs soft-deleted. Daily update.
absence_means: Bucket is empty

name: storage.googleapis.com/storage/v2/deleted_bytes
definition: Bytes deleted per day by storage class. NOT FOUND in Tsuga — may not be collected.
absence_means: No deletions in the period or metric not collected

name: storage.googleapis.com/anywhere_cache/request_count
definition: Number of Anywhere Cache API calls by method and cache hit status. UNEXPECTED — found in Tsuga but was excluded from core scope.
absence_means: Anywhere Cache not configured for this bucket/zone

name: storage.googleapis.com/anywhere_cache/sent_bytes_count
definition: Bytes sent from Anywhere Cache by method and hit status.
absence_means: Anywhere Cache not configured

name: storage.googleapis.com/storage/v2/total_byte_seconds
definition: V2 daily storage in byte-seconds with type label. Reported as gauge in Tsuga. UNEXPECTED — found in Tsuga.
absence_means: Bucket is empty

name: storage.googleapis.com/storage/v2/total_count
definition: V2 object count with type label (live vs soft-deleted). UNEXPECTED — found in Tsuga.
absence_means: Bucket is empty
